creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
incorrect distinfo for multimedia/zoneminder

Fix: [root@timbsd /usr/ports/multimedia/zoneminder]# diff -u distinfo.orig distinfo
How-To-Repeat: [root@timbsd /usr/ports/multimedia/zoneminder]# make
===>  License GPLv2 accepted by the user
=> ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch http://www2.zoneminder.com/downloads/ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz
fetch: http://www2.zoneminder.com/downloads/ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1061868, actual 1061935
=> Attempting to fetch http://www.zoneminder.com/downloads/ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz
fetch: http://www.zoneminder.com/downloads/ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz: size mismatch: expected 1061868, actual 1061935
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz
fetch: ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/ZoneMinder-1.24.4.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/multimedia/zoneminder.
